result.title: How to Vibe Code a Website in 10 Minutes
result.description:
Learn how to build a professional website in 10 minutes using Google AI Studio. From mood boards to a live site, see how easy web design and vibe coding can be. 

0:00 – Define Vibe: Mood Board to Aesthetic 
0:44 – Prompt to Code: Wireframe and Structure  
1:21 – Custom Branding: Swap Your Product Images 
1:44 – Go Live: Share and Publish Website

We have a lot of educational tutorials coming, so subscribe to this channel and keep and eye out for those! In the meantime, our “Build apps in AI Studio” article is a great resource for getting started: https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/aistudio-build-mode
Build your ideas with Gemini: https://aistudio.google.com/apps
More information on how to ship your site or builds here: https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/aistudio-build-mode#deploy-or

#BuildWithGemini #VibeCoding #BuildAWebsite

result.title: Search Live is global 🌍 Talk to Search with voice and video in your language
result.description:
Search Live is global! 🌍 Now in 200+ countries and territories, you can use voice & video to talk with Search in your preferred language. 

#GoogleSearch #SearchLive

result.title: Visualizing World Models with Project Genie | Vibe Coding with Gemini
result.description:
How do you visualize the concept of a world model? Coders Kaloyan Kolev and Arden Schager share how they used Google AI Studio to vibe code custom design tools for Project Genie. They demonstrate how hands-on tools like 3D physics sliders and custom animation timelines enable teams of designers and engineers to work together to explore new ideas together. 

Try vibe coding in Google AI Studio yourself: https://aistudio.google.com/apps  

#BuildWithGemini #VibeCoding #GoogleAIStudio
